'''鈭歯-dh-d''' ('''nadhada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbewitch|unbewitch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-dh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbewitch|unbewitch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-dh-d
|-
! Lemma
| nadhada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nadhadithi|nadhadithi]] || [[word:nadhadiji|nadhadiji]] || [[word:nadhadishi|nadhadishi]] || [[word:nadhadi|nadhadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nadhaduthuth|nadhaduthuth]] || [[word:nadhadujuj|nadhadujuj]] || [[word:nadhadushush|nadhadushush]] || [[word:nadhad|nadhad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nadhaduthu|nadhaduthu]] || [[word:nadhaduju|nadhaduju]] || [[word:nadhadushu|nadhadushu]] || [[word:nadhadu|nadhadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nadhadufuth|nadhadufuth]] || [[word:nadhadufuj|nadhadufuj]] || [[word:nadhadufush|nadhadufush]] || [[word:nadhaduf|nadhaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nadhadethe|nadhadethe]] || [[word:nadhadeje|nadhadeje]] || [[word:nadhadeshe|nadhadeshe]] || [[word:nadhade|nadhade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nadhadothoth|nadhadothoth]] || [[word:nadhadojoj|nadhadojoj]] || [[word:nadhadoshosh|nadhadoshosh]] || [[word:nadhad|nadhad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nadhadotho|nadhadotho]] || [[word:nadhadojo|nadhadojo]] || [[word:nadhadosho|nadhadosho]] || [[word:nadhado|nadhado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nadhadofoth|nadhadofoth]] || [[word:nadhadofoj|nadhadofoj]] || [[word:nadhadofosh|nadhadofosh]] || [[word:nadhadof|nadhadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nadhad忙th忙|nadhad忙th忙]] || [[word:nadhad忙j忙|nadhad忙j忙]] || [[word:nadhad忙sh忙|nadhad忙sh忙]] || [[word:nadhad忙|nadhad忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nadhadathath|nadhadathath]] || [[word:nadhadajaj|nadhadajaj]] || [[word:nadhadashash|nadhadashash]] || [[word:nadhad|nadhad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nadhadatha|nadhadatha]] || [[word:nadhadaja|nadhadaja]] || [[word:nadhadasha|nadhadasha]] || [[word:nadhada|nadhada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nadhadafath|nadhadafath]] || [[word:nadhadafaj|nadhadafaj]] || [[word:nadhadafash|nadhadafash]] || [[word:nadhadaf|nadhadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:nadhadasha|nadhadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gonadhadasha|gonadhadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokinadhadasha|gokinadhadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:nadhadn眉sha|nadhadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gonadhadnkn眉sha|gonadhadnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokinadhadn眉sha|gokinadhadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nadhadsh毛sha|nadhadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonadhadnksh毛sha|gonadhadnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinadhadsh毛sha|gokinadhadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nadhadrosha|nadhadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonadhadnkrosha|gonadhadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinadhadrosha|gokinadhadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nadhadmusha|nadhadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonadhadnkmusha|gonadhadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinadhadmusha|gokinadhadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:nadhadsherasha|nadhadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gonadhadnksherasha|gonadhadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokinadhadsherasha|gokinadhadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:nadhadngasha|nadhadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gonadhadnkngasha|gonadhadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokinadhadngasha|gokinadhadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nadhadyasha|nadhadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonadhadnkyasha|gonadhadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokinadhadyasha|gokinadhadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:nadhadyamasha|nadhadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gonadhadnkyamasha|gonadhadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokinadhadyamasha|gokinadhadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:nadhadn眉sh毛sha|nadhadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonadhadnkn眉sh毛sha|gonadhadnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinadhadn眉sh毛sha|gokinadhadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nadhadn眉rosha|nadhadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonadhadnkn眉rosha|gonadhadnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinadhadn眉rosha|gokinadhadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nadhadn眉musha|nadhadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonadhadnkn眉musha|gonadhadnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinadhadn眉musha|gokinadhadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:nadhadsh毛n眉sha|nadhadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonadhadnksh毛n眉sha|gonadhadnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinadhadsh毛n眉sha|gokinadhadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nadhadsh毛rosha|nadhadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonadhadnksh毛rosha|gonadhadnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinadhadsh毛rosha|gokinadhadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nadhadsh毛musha|nadhadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonadhadnksh毛musha|gonadhadnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinadhadsh毛musha|gokinadhadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:nadhadron眉sha|nadhadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonadhadnkron眉sha|gonadhadnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinadhadron眉sha|gokinadhadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:nadhadrosh毛sha|nadhadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonadhadnkrosh毛sha|gonadhadnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinadhadrosh毛sha|gokinadhadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nadhadromusha|nadhadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonadhadnkromusha|gonadhadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinadhadromusha|gokinadhadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:nadhadmun眉sha|nadhadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonadhadnkmun眉sha|gonadhadnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinadhadmun眉sha|gokinadhadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:nadhadmush毛sha|nadhadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonadhadnkmush毛sha|gonadhadnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinadhadmush毛sha|gokinadhadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nadhadmurosha|nadhadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonadhadnkmurosha|gonadhadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinadhadmurosha|gokinadhadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:nadhad|nadhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n忙dh忙d|n忙dh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:honadhad|honadhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hon忙dh忙d|hon忙dh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonadhad|hohonadhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohon忙dh忙d|hohon忙dh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉nadhad|n眉nadhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉n忙dh忙d|n眉n忙dh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉nadhad|n眉n眉nadhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉n忙dh忙d|n眉n眉n忙dh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂nadhad|n茂nadhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂n忙dh忙d|n茂n忙dh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂nadhad|n茂n茂nadhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂n忙dh忙d|n茂n茂n忙dh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lunadhad|lunadhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lun忙dh忙d|lun忙dh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunadhad|lulunadhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulun忙dh忙d|lulun忙dh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:linadhad|linadhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lin忙dh忙d|lin忙dh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinadhad|lilinadhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilin忙dh忙d|lilin忙dh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:konadhad|konadhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kon忙dh忙d|kon忙dh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonadhad|kokonadhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokon忙dh忙d|kokon忙dh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kenadhad|kenadhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ken忙dh忙d|ken忙dh忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenadhad|kekenadhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keken忙dh忙d|keken忙dh忙d]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
